CustomField.description: DD feedback : automatically filled in by WTP Organisator Feedback (WTP.Contact_Owner_Feedback__c) when : a due dilligence is related to the opportunity related due dil is closed the present field is still empty when DD is closed
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Please state any important comments related to this opportunity (ex: Reason for Win/Loss, client’s feedback on provided documents, other client’s comments). Please note: your comments will be automatically populated to other WTPs linked with this opportunity
CustomField.label: Client Feedback
